tags.label: INTRO
tags.reason: Section frames the research gap, motivates the present study, and transitions from literature review

tags.label: THEORY_LIT
tags.reason: References prior research and summarizes contradictions in the literature

tags.label: METHODS
tags.reason: Describes data preprocessing steps performed by the authors on their dataset

tags.label: METHODS

tags.reason: Discusses limitations of the study and interprets what the analysis cannot address

tags.label: CONCLUSION
tags.reason: Suggests directions for future research, which is a common concluding function
